ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Discorso del dottor Ovidio Montalbani havuto publicamente nell`Academia Illustrissima degl`Indomiti di Bologna li 17 Aprile 1643
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: V. D. Lodovicus Madronus sacrae Bonon. Poenitentiariae Rector pro eminentiss. et Reverendiss. D. D. Principe Card. Columna Archiepiscopo | Impirmatur D. Hieronymus Bendadus Doct. Colleg. Lect. Publicus et S. Inquisitionis Consultor pro Reverendiss. P. Inquisitore Bonon.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
